title: Sculked
description: A deep dark expansion mod adding onto deepslate and sculk
body:
Sculked adds to all aspects of sculk, deepslate and the deep dark, from new deepslate variations like pillar, cut and smooth, to a variety of plants and decorations to add life to the deep dark whilst keeping its dead feel,

                          If you run into any bugs or glitches, please report them on the Discord Server

FAQ:

Q: Is there ____ Compatibility?

A: As of right now, the only mod with compatibility is the create mod. I want to add compatibility to more mods but i still need to work some things out.

 

Q: Can I add this mod to my modpack?

A: Yes! As long as I am credited

 

Q: Can you backport this to ____?

A: Short answer, No. This mod is to update sculk, so porting it to any older version will make no sense.

 

Q: Can you update this to the newest version?
A: Until I learn java, Sculked will update to the newest version whenever MCreator allows it.

 

Q: Can you add _____?

A: It depends really, but there is a suggestions tab in the Discord server so feel free to leave any suggestions there!
